seoTitle: Carine vs Carlisle — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Carine and Carlisle. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Carine and Carlisle.
heading: Carine vs Carlisle — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Carine, Western Australia and Carlisle, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Carine has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Carlisle (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Carine or Carlisle safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Carine has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Carlisle scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Carine scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Carlisle scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Carine or Carlisle?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Carine has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
